tasks.title: Persistent Batch Queue (Node)
tasks.description: Implemented SQLite-backed WAL in node/pkg/queue/ to prevent data loss on Qdrant failure.

tasks.title: Circuit Breaker (Node)
tasks.description: Implemented circuit breaker in node/pkg/extractor/sidecar.go to skip binaries on repeated failures.

tasks.title: Strict Namespace Mode (Gateway)
tasks.description: Enforced mandatory namespace parameter in Gateway via EMDEX_STRICT_NAMESPACE.

tasks.title: Deployment & Verification
tasks.description: Synced to .156, rebuilt, and verified resilience pillars. Node storage resized to 28G to accommodate build artifacts.
